---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: Instructions Generator
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate an agent instruction .md file for it in the /docs directory. if a .md file provided, use that, otherwise generate a appropriate file name based on the  generated content. Make sure instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update AGENTS.md file to reference the new docs file.If no information provided below, prompt the user fo the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standard to document.
